items.desc_zh: Super Micro 是最新一家宣布进军资本市场的与人工智能热潮相关的公司。

items.desc_zh: 如果华尔街的共识是正确的，消费者价格指数预计将显示年通胀率为 4.2%。

items.title_zh: 美国能源部长表示霍尔木兹海峡船舶交通量增加后油价下跌
items.desc_en: President Donald Trump has repeatedly said a deal with Tehran to reopen Hormuz is close, but such an agreement still has not materialized.

items.title_en: Williams rolls back the years on return at Queen's
items.title_zh: 威廉姆斯重返女王大学后，岁月倒流
items.desc_en: Serena Williams rolls back the years at Queen's with a winning performance on her comeback to tennis after 1,375 days away from the sport.
items.desc_zh: 塞雷娜·威廉姆斯 (Serena Williams) 在远离网球运动 1,375 天后重返网球赛场时，以一场胜利的表现回顾了她在女王大学的岁月。

items.desc_zh: Claude Fable 5 是 Anthropic 的 Claude Mythos 的一个版本，这是一个在技术、金融和政府领导人中引起轰动的人工智能程序

items.title_zh: 随着盈利交易逆转，半导体空头不断增加

items.desc_zh: 投资者最喜欢的交易突然变成了他们无法停止做空的交易。

items.title_en: Nasa names next astronauts for Artemis Moon programme
items.title_zh: 美国宇航局任命阿尔忒弥斯月球计划的下一任宇航员
items.desc_en: Nasa names its next Artemis crew, though they will not be walking on the Moon or even going anywhere near it.
items.desc_zh: 美国宇航局任命了下一批阿尔忒弥斯宇航员，尽管他们不会在月球上行走，甚至不会去任何靠近月球的地方。

items.title_en: As LIV Golf faces a Saudi funding cliff, CEO says to take PIF 'at their word'
items.title_zh: LIV Golf 面临沙特资金悬崖，首席执行官表示要“相信 PIF 的话”
items.desc_en: PIF is set to stop funding the golf league after the 2026 season, though O'Neil could not guarantee that the final four tournaments will take place.
items.desc_zh: PIF 将在 2026 赛季结束后停止资助高尔夫联盟，但奥尼尔无法保证最后四场比赛的举行。

items.title_en: Trump says Iran shot down US helicopter and vows to respond
items.title_zh: 特朗普称伊朗击落美国直升机并发誓做出回应
items.desc_en: Two crew members of the Apache helicopter that crashed following the attack were rescued by an American sea drone.
items.desc_zh: 袭击后坠毁的阿帕奇直升机的两名机组人员被一架美国海上无人机救起。

items.title_en: SpaceX IPO explained: The price is set, but retail allocation still up in the air
items.title_zh: SpaceX IPO解释：价格已定，但零售分配仍悬而未决
items.desc_en: Charles Schwab, Fidelity, Robinhood, SoFi and Morgan Stanley's E-Trade are among the brokerage platforms making SpaceX shares available.
items.desc_zh: 嘉信理财 (Charles Schwab)、富达 (Fidelity)、Robinhood、SoFi 和摩根士丹利 (Morgan Stanley) 的 E-Trade 等经纪平台均提供 SpaceX 股票。

items.title_en: FIFA pres. on ticket prices: The World Cup being in America is a 'once-in-a-lifetime opportunity'
items.title_zh: 国际足联新闻。关于票价：在美国举办世界杯是“千载难逢的机会”
items.desc_en: CNBC’s Sara Eisen sits down with FIFA President Gianni Infantino and AB InBev CEO Michel Doukeris to discuss FIFA’s World Cup sponsorship deal with AB InBev, the tournament’s economic impact, concerns
items.desc_zh: CNBC 的萨拉·艾森 (Sara Eisen) 与国际足联 (FIFA) 主席詹尼·因凡蒂诺 (Gianni Infantino) 和百威英博 (AB InBev) 首席执行官米歇尔·杜克里斯 (Michel Doukeris) 坐下来讨论国际足联 (FIFA) 与百威英博 (AB InBev) 的世界杯赞助协议、赛事的经济影响以及担忧

items.title_en: Anthropic releases Mythos-like AI model to the public two months after private rollout rocked Wall Street
items.title_zh: 在私人推出震撼华尔街两个月后，Anthropic 向公众发布了类似 Mythos 的人工智能模型
items.desc_en: Anthropic said the broad release is possible because of new safeguards that block responses in specific high-risk areas.
items.desc_zh: Anthropic 表示，由于新的保障措施阻止了特定高风险区域的响应，因此广泛发布是可能的。

items.title_en: Trump says U.S. must 'respond' after Iran shoots down helicopter over Hormuz Strait
items.title_zh: 特朗普称伊朗在霍尔木兹海峡击落直升机后美国必须“做出回应”

items.title_en: Farage says Reform has contacted X 'at highest level' over fake AI ads
items.title_zh: Farage 表示 Reform 已就虚假 AI 广告问题与“最高层”X 联系
items.desc_en: The fake ads feature the governor of the Bank of England - the Bank has urged people to report them.
items.desc_zh: 这些虚假广告的主角是英格兰银行行长，该银行已敦促人们举报这些广告。

items.title_en: Two reportedly killed as women take part in rare protest in Afghanistan
items.title_zh: 据报道，阿富汗妇女参加罕见抗议活动时造成两人死亡
items.desc_en: The demonstration, in the western city of Herat, was broken up after police are alleged to have opened fire.
items.desc_zh: 据称，警方开枪后，西部城市赫拉特的示威活动被驱散。

items.title_en: EU orders Meta to open WhatsApp to rival AI chatbots
items.title_zh: 欧盟命令 Meta 向人工智能聊天机器人开放 WhatsApp
items.desc_en: Meta has accused the EU of "regulatory overreach" and says its decision will allow tech giants like OpenAI free access to WhatsApp.
items.desc_zh: Meta 指责欧盟“监管越权”，并表示其决定将允许 OpenAI 等科技巨头免费使用 WhatsApp。

items.title_en: Israeli air strikes hit Lebanese city of Tyre despite Iranian warning to stop attacks
items.title_zh: 尽管伊朗警告停止袭击，以色列仍对黎巴嫩城市提尔发动空袭
items.desc_en: Iran warned Israel on Monday that it could resume hostilities if attacks on its Lebanese ally Hezbollah do not stop.
items.desc_zh: 伊朗周一警告以色列，如果不停止对其黎巴嫩盟友真主党的袭击，伊朗可能会恢复敌对行动。

items.title_en: Scrapping of Franco-German fighter jet leaves allies at odds on defence future
items.title_zh: 法德战斗机报废导致盟国在国防未来问题上出现分歧
items.desc_en: The flagship partnership project became a glaring example of discord between the two nations.
items.desc_zh: 这一旗舰伙伴关系项目成为两国之间不和的一个明显例子。

items.title_en: Murder of Lyhanna, 11, enrages France and turns up heat on government
items.title_zh: 11 岁莱哈娜 (Lyhanna) 被杀激怒法国并激怒政府
items.desc_en: Protesters are angry that the suspect had already been reported to police last August in a separate case.
items.desc_zh: 抗议者对嫌疑人去年八月在另一起案件中向警方报案感到愤怒。

items.title_en: I have right papers and visa - barred referee Artan
items.title_zh: 我有正确的文件和签证 - 被禁止的裁判 Artan
items.desc_en: Somali referee Omar Artan says he was subjected to an 11-hour immigration interview before being denied entry to the United States for the World Cup despite holding the "right papers" and "right visa"
items.desc_zh: 索马里裁判奥马尔·阿尔坦表示，尽管他持有“正确的文件”和“正确的签证”，但在被拒绝进入美国观看世界杯之前，他接受了长达 11 个小时的移民面试

items.title_en: Xi Cements Sway Over North Korea as Kim Names China Top Priority - Bloomberg.com
items.title_zh: 金正恩将中国列为首要任务，习近平巩固了对朝鲜的影响力 - Bloomberg.com
items.desc_en: Xi Cements Sway Over North Korea as Kim Names China Top Priority  Bloomberg.comWhat Xi and Kim Want From Their Summit in North Korea  WSJThe relationship between China and North Korea  NPRAnalysis: Ch
items.desc_zh: 金正恩将中国列为首要任务，习近平巩固了对朝鲜的影响力  Bloomberg.com 习近平和金正恩希望从朝鲜峰会中得到什么  《华尔街日报》中朝关系

items.title_en: Ariana Grande and Ethan Slater split after three years
items.title_zh: 阿丽亚娜·格兰德 (Ariana Grande) 与伊桑·斯莱特 (Ethan Slater) 交往三年后分手
items.desc_en: The pair met on the set of the first Wicked movie, for which Grande received an Oscar nomination.
items.desc_zh: 两人在第一部《魔法坏女巫》电影的片场相识，格兰德因此获得了奥斯卡提名。

items.title_en: Kenyan police fire tear gas at protest against US Ebola quarantine centre plan
items.title_zh: 肯尼亚警方发射催泪瓦斯抗议美国埃博拉检疫中心计划
items.desc_en: Protesters are concerned about cross-border infection risks and the lack of transparency from the government about the treatment centre.
items.desc_zh: 抗议者担心跨境感染风险以及政府对治疗中心缺乏透明度。

items.title_en: Hundreds of aftershocks jolt Philippines as officials say death toll could rise
items.title_zh: 菲律宾发生数百次余震，官员称死亡人数可能上升
items.desc_en: Dozens of people are dead and hundreds more injured following an earthquake in the country's south.
items.desc_zh: 该国南部发生地震，造成数十人死亡、数百人受伤。

items.title_en: Could humanoid robots be heading for the battlefield?
items.title_zh: 人形机器人会走向战场吗？
items.desc_en: Armed forces are experimenting with humanoid robots, but battlefield deployment is some way off.
items.desc_zh: 武装部队正在试验人形机器人，但距离战场部署还有一段距离。

items.title_en: OpenAI plans to go public, intensifying investment race with Anthropic
items.title_zh: OpenAI拟上市，与Anthropic的投资竞赛加剧
items.desc_en: The company behind ChatGPT filed its plans one week after Anthropic did the same.
items.desc_zh: ChatGPT 背后的公司在 Anthropic 提交计划一周后也提出了同样的计划。

items.title_en: Apple unveils Siri AI makeover as Tim Cook bids farewell
items.title_zh: 蒂姆·库克 (Tim Cook) 告别之际，苹果推出 Siri AI 改造版
items.desc_en: The technology giant also revealed a series of new child safety features amid widespread scrutiny over "nudification" apps.
items.desc_zh: 在对“裸体”应用程序的广泛审查中，这家科技巨头还推出了一系列新的儿童安全功能。

items.desc_en: The former leader of crypto platform FTX, currently serving a 25-year sentence, on Monday officially applied to be pardoned.
items.desc_zh: 加密货币平台 FTX 的前领导人目前正在服刑 25 年，周一正式申请赦免。

items.desc_zh: 该公司表示，预计 2026 年上半年调整后收益至少为 3800 万美元（2820 万英镑）。
